description_long: This is a modern rectangular mattress with a plush, quilted white top and a dark gray fabric base. The top surface features a tufted pattern with subtle geometric accents in the center, providing both visual interest and enhanced comfort. The sides are wrapped in a textured dark gray fabric, with vertical black handles or accents visible on the longer edges. A prominent brand label is sewn onto one of the shorter sides, accompanied by a small blue tag. The mattress appears thick and supportive, likely containing multiple internal layers such as foam and springs. The overall appearance is clean, well-constructed, and suitable for use in a bedroom or as discarded furniture in an urban environment.
description: A thick, plush mattress with a quilted white top, geometric tufting, and a dark gray fabric base, featuring a visible brand label and side accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the brand label and blue tag on the short side, with the quilted white top and dark gray base clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long edge with two vertical black handles or accents and the central geometric tufting pattern on the top.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front but without the brand label or tag, showing the quilted top and dark gray base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two vertical black handles or accents, displaying the geometric tufting and textured side fabric.
attribute_brand_label: A black and white 'Beautyrest' brand label is sewn onto the center of the short front side, with a small blue rectangular tag to its right. Both are clearly legible.
attribute_pattern_design: The top surface features a quilted pattern with evenly spaced tufts and a central geometric motif of interlocking diamond shapes.
attribute_tag_or_sticker: A small blue tag is attached to the front short side near the brand label, likely indicating product information.
attribute_edge_piping: There is a thin, continuous black edge piping running around the top and bottom edges of the mattress, providing a defined border and added durability.
